programme.title: Killer Confessions: Case Files Of A Texas Ranger
Body Cam 2
programme.desc: The program includes a behind-the-scenes look at police work from the perspective of officers' video recordings.Viewers will see surprising, dangerous and blood-curdling cases of cases that are far from routine.

programme.title: Killer Confessions: Case Files Of A Texas Ranger
Good Cop, Bad Cop
programme.desc: A murder investigation is always long and difficult.Even more so if the perpetrator is always one step ahead of the detectives and there is a possibility that he may be one of the police officers.

programme.title: Extreme Forensics 2
programme.desc: The second series of a documentary series revealing the behind-the-scenes of detectives' work.In the program we will hear about the strangest crimes whose perpetrators were caught thanks to modern technology.

programme.title: Extreme Forensics 2
programme.desc: The second series of a documentary series revealing the behind-the-scenes of detectives' work.In the program we will hear about the strangest crimes whose perpetrators were caught thanks to modern technology.

programme.title: Chaos in Court
programme.desc: In the courtroom, situations often arise when nervous people lose their temper.Viewers will learn about the everyday life of lawyers, judges, prosecutors and forensic psychologists.

programme.title: Chaos in Court
programme.desc: In the courtroom, situations often arise when nervous people lose their temper.Viewers will learn about the everyday life of lawyers, judges, prosecutors and forensic psychologists.

programme.title: Good Cop, Bad Cop
programme.desc: A murder investigation is always long and difficult.Even more so if the perpetrator is always one step ahead of the detectives and there is a possibility that he may be one of the police officers.

programme.title: Good Cop, Bad Cop
programme.desc: A murder investigation is always long and difficult.Even more so if the perpetrator is always one step ahead of the detectives and there is a possibility that he may be one of the police officers.

programme.title: Body Cam
programme.desc: The series records the work performed by the police every day.In each episode we will see how law enforcement officers deal with dangerous situations.

programme.title: How (Not) to Get Rid of a Body
programme.desc: The program shows the extremes to which murderers can go to avoid punishment.Each episode presents the stories of criminals who will do anything to hide their crimes and get rid of their victims.

credits.actor: Self - Former Prosecutor Cuyahoga County Prosecutors Office - Tim McGinty

programme.title: How (Not) to Get Rid of a Body

programme.title: I Went Undercover
programme.desc: True stories of ordinary people who secretly helped police investigate murders.Viewers will learn behind the scenes of their courageous and dedicated work.

programme.title: I Went Undercover
programme.desc: True stories of ordinary people who secretly helped police investigate murders.Viewers will learn behind the scenes of their courageous and dedicated work.

programme.title: Disappeared 8
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of disappearance investigations.Viewers will learn about the psychological portraits and everyday habits of each character in the episode.This helps determine whether the person disappeared of their own accord.

programme.title: Disappeared 8
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of disappearance investigations.Viewers will learn about the psychological portraits and everyday habits of each character in the episode.This helps determine whether the person disappeared of their own accord.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates 3
programme.desc: The third series of stories about crime cases that gained notoriety by being published in magazines.Journalists reveal the behind-the-scenes of the crime and present the profile of the criminal.

programme.title: Word Of Life Cult: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: The formation of a small Bible society eventually became hell.Survivors reveal the behind-the-scenes of a teenager's murder.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder
programme.desc: The series presents difficult-to-solve crime puzzles.Their unraveling will only be possible by reconstructing the last moments of the victim's life.

programme.desc: The series presents difficult-to-solve crime puzzles.Their unraveling will only be possible by reconstructing the last moments of the victim's life.

programme.title: Signs Of A Psychopath 2
programme.desc: Profiles of the most brutal murderers of modern times.Viewers will see film materials as well as interviews with the killers themselves.They reveal their terrifying personality traits.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: Shocking stories about crimes that happened in small Central American cities.They divided the local inhabitants forever.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death
programme.desc: The program includes behind the scenes of true crimes and confessions of relatives of brutally murdered victims.

programme.title: Last Night in...
programme.desc: Many criminals go hunting after dark.The program presents terrible stories of crimes that took place under the cover of darkness.

programme.title: Last Night in... 2
programme.desc: Shocking stories of brutal crimes that took place after nightfall.

programme.title: American Detective With Lt. Joe Kenda
programme.desc: Well-known and experienced policeman Joe Kenda reveals the behind-the-scenes of the most brutal and strangest crimes committed in the USA.
